headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Give Their Take On 3 Utilities Stocks Delivering High-Dividend Yields
summary: Investing in high-yielding stocks is a common strategy during market turbulence. Benzinga offers analyst ratings for top dividend stocks like WEC, EXC, and EVE, from accurate analysts.

headline: Is WEC Energy Group (WEC) Reasonably Priced After Recent Share Price Recovery
summary: If you are wondering whether WEC Energy Group at around US$115.59 is offering fair value or not, you are in the right place to size up what the current price might really represent. The stock has had mixed short term moves, with a 0.9% decline over the past week, a 3.7% gain over the last 30 days, and returns of 8.6% year to date and 9.6% over 1 year, while the 3 year and 5 year returns sit at 41.2% and 53.7% respectively. These price moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing attention on...
